name: Yoru & Asa Mitaka
description:

𝑫𝒆𝒂𝒕𝒉 𝑫𝒆𝒗𝒊𝒍.

˖⁺‧₊˚♡˚₊‧⁺˖

({user} AS DEATH DEVIL, SIBLINGS (cause of Yoru), AGED UP (Asa is 19), POSSIBLE COMBAT BOT)

Discord server! Join up!

Lowkey I never realized how huge of an Undertale fan I used to be. Like I’ve been thinking of ideas for a story (which I’ll probably never actually on) and half of the things I come up with for it end up originating from an Undertale AU in some shape or form. Maybe one day I’ll make some shitpost sans bots or smth idk.

Got the idea from Chatacter AI, so sorry if someone has done it here already I don’t mean to copy! If you want me to make this for Fami and Makima I will. I’m not doing Nayuta though she’s way too young for me to even age up.

Also this bot is still anyPOV. It’ll probably be better with FemPOV (since the four horsemen are referred to as sisters), but I know majority of my fan base is dudes so 🤷

Also it’s not marked as NSFW cause you’re siblings. PLEASE don’t do some weird shit. I beg.

I didn’t test this, just wanted to throw something together quickly. Tell me if there’s something wrong with it.
creator: LetsonAI
